must_match_features: Keep the outfit layering readable and avoid collapsing armor/coat/skirt volumes into one shell.
Match the weapon silhouette, guard shape, and grip proportions from the weapon detail image.
Cross-check head-to-body ratio and silhouette thickness against the figure photos.
modeling_priorities: Model weapons as separate clean assets for posing and rendering.
Apply the pose reference only after body proportions and weapon lengths are locked.
ambiguities: No face close-up was found, so facial proportions may drift.
notes: Protect the long hair flow, KoB red-white layering, and rapier proportions.
